lessons.title: I Have a Pet
lessons.topic: Cat, Dog, Bird and the I like pattern

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal says 'meow' and loves to climb trees?
What animal enjoys wagging its tail and playing catch?
questions.hint: This animal is very loyal and friendly.

questions.question_text: Which creature can flap its wings and twitters beautifully?
questions.hint: This animal builds nests in trees.

steps.title: Tom's Pets
steps.text: Tom has a pet. It is a cat. Tom says, 'I like my cat.' The cat is with a bird. Do you like birds?

questions.question: What does Tom say about his cat?

steps.explanation: Say 'I like' to talk about pets you love.

steps.audio_text: I have a dog named Max. He loves to play in the park. Do you like dogs?

questions.question: What does Max love to do?

questions.question_text: I like ___s. (Fill in the blank with a pet)
Which one is a pet? (Vocabulary question)
Where does a bird like to be? (Reading comprehension)
True or False: A dog can swim.

lessons.title: I Don't Like...
lessons.topic: Rabbit, Mouse, Turtle and negative preference

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet hops and has long ears?
questions.hint: This pet likes to hop and nibble on carrots!

questions.question_text: Which tiny pet is known for squeaking and running?
questions.hint: It's small and has a long tail!

questions.question_text: Which pet carries its house on its back?
questions.hint: This pet loves water and moves slowly!

steps.title: Turtle's Friends
steps.text: Look! A turtle is slow. I don't like the mouse. I like the rabbit. The rabbit jumps high.

steps.explanation: Use 'I like' for things you enjoy.

steps.audio_text: I like rabbits, but I don't like mice. My friend thinks turtles are the best pets! Do you like turtles?

questions.question: What animal does she not like?

questions.question_text: Which pet has long ears and hops?
I don't like ___.
True or False: Turtles can fly.
What can crawl into a small hole, a mouse or a turtle?

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet can swim but doesn't drink water?
questions.hint: This pet has a tail and lives in water.

questions.question_text: Which animal gets scared during thunderstorms?
questions.hint: It stays close to its owner when scared.

questions.question_text: Which pet has a collar with a bell?
questions.hint: This pet loves to purr and climb.

steps.title: Splash the Fish
steps.text: Do you like water? Splash the fish does! Splash is in the pond. I like Splash because it is cute. Do you like Splash?

steps.explanation: Use this to say what you enjoy.

steps.audio_text: Do you like fish? They swim in the water and are very colorful. I think fish are really cute!

questions.question: What do fish do in the water?
Do you think fish are cute?

questions.question_text: Do you like ___? (Grammar question)
Which word means 'beautiful and sweet'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Fish live on land.
Where do fish swim? (Reading comprehension question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which pet has feathers and can sing songs?
questions.hint: This pet tweets and loves to fly!

questions.question_text: Which pet loves to hop and eat carrots?
questions.hint: This pet has long ears and a fluffy tail!

questions.question_text: Which pet is known for being a loyal friend and wagging its tail?
questions.hint: This pet barks and loves to play fetch!

steps.title: Pets and Preferences
steps.text: My name is Mia. I like dogs and fish. I have one big dog. I don't like snakes. Do you like fish? Yes, I do!

questions.question: Does Mia have a big dog?

steps.audio_text: My dog Max loves to play with his red ball. Every day we go to the park and have lots of fun!

questions.question: Do they go to the park every day?

steps.prompt: Tell me one pet you like and one pet you don't like. You can say: I like cats, I don't like frogs.
steps.expected_text: i like cats i don't like frogs

questions.question_text: I ___ cats because they are playful. (Grammar question)
Which animal is known for swimming in water? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: A hamster is larger than a dog.
What does Max do every day? He goes to the ___. (Reading comprehension question)
Do you like to hop around? (Grammar question)
